fields.isPayoutDate: Whether a dividend was paid on this date
fields.dividendPerShare: Dividend per share paid on this date
fields.ttmEps: Most recent reported trailing-twelve-month Net EPS as of this date (forward-filled from quarterly reports)
fields.peRatio: Derived price-to-earnings ratio: close / ttmEps (null when either input is unavailable)
fields.sharesOutstanding: Approximate current shares outstanding in millions (constant per ticker, from config/shares-outstanding.json)
fields.marketCap: Derived market capitalization in USD millions: close * sharesOutstanding (null when either is unavailable)
